reason: Model Congo VAT as 18% VAT plus centimes equal to 5% of VAT, and gate every reduced or zero treatment by exact evidence.

officialSources.title: Journal officiel - Finance Law 2026
officialSources.evidence: Current Annex 3 and Annex 5 lists; invoice disclosure of 18% VAT and 5%-of-VAT centimes; below-XAF-100m forfait description.

threshold.boundary: below threshold is described as forfait in the 2026 execution rules

failClosedRules: No broad food, medical, education, agriculture or export shortcut.
The 5.25% path requires rateEvidenceConfirmed=true and rateEvidenceType=annex-5-tariff-line.
The 0% path requires rateEvidenceConfirmed=true and rateEvidenceType=article-22-zero-case.
The page preserves entered precision and discloses Article 21 filing-base rounding.
No registration, exemption, deduction, withholding, filing, return or payment decision is automated.
privacy: Calculation, evidence choices and PDF remain local; shared links contain no entered values.
tests: Executable AfroVAT tests cover missing, mismatched and accepted evidence.
